content.en:
Just refining a wisp of black mist multidimensional body is not considered a success, it is just a beginning.

The process of cultivating the Black Mist Multidimensional Body is extremely cumbersome, and this inheritance is too incomplete, and the cultivated Black Mist Multidimensional Body is at most only one-third of the power of the real Black Mist Multidimensional Body, and the sequelae are serious, making it even more difficult to cultivate.

Even if Ye Tian initially understood the inheritance of the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, he was not 100% sure that he would be able to practice the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body at one time.

Next, he cultivated according to the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, but after cultivating for a period of time, his physical body directly shattered.

"Failed to cultivate?"

Ye Tian frowned.

This sudden failure made him a little confused, he thought about it carefully, it seemed that when he cultivated to a certain node, the backlash of the black mist multidimensional body suddenly increased by a hundredfold, which made the black mist energy that had been refined in the whole body explode, and then shattered all the flesh.

If you want to solve this problem, you can't help it, or use some special things to resist the power of the backlash and get through this node.

Or try again and again to solve the problem of backlash.

"The Red Wolf Family should have known about this step, but they didn't tell me!"

247 Ye Tian thought to himself.

This is quite normal, after all, the Red Wolf Family doesn't want to really trade with him at all, how can they talk about problems in the cultivation process!

Ye Tian didn't have a treasure in his hand to resist the power of the backlash, so he could only choose to try again and again.

Then, he began to try again and again, and each time he reached this point, he failed, resulting in a fall or a heavy blow.

Before you know it, several extradimensional epochs have passed.

After many attempts, Ye Tian finally thought of a way to solve the power of the backlash, that is, to deduce and improve it, and modify the cultivation method of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body.

Of course.

With his ability, modifying the entire Black Mist Multidimensional Body, it was naturally impossible to do it, but just perfecting the cultivation content of this node, it was still not a big problem.

After his continuous deduction, he finally succeeded in perfecting.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian easily crossed this node.

It's a pity that in the back, there were problems with his cultivation again, which caused a heavy injury to his body, but he improved it again.

In the process of cultivating and perfecting again and again, he perfected the three nodes, and finally completed the initial cultivation of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's body began to transform, and a large amount of black mist energy poured into his body, and his body was in the boundary of about to collapse but not collapsing.

This is also a very dangerous step, once the transformation fails, it will also fall.

Ye Tian used the powerful extra-dimensional rule realm to suppress his physical body and prevent his physical body from collapsing.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian's breath has gradually stabilized.

And he finally preliminarily cultivated the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body.

"Seventy percent of the physical body is damaged, thirty percent of the super-dimensional Dao species are damaged, and the black mist multi-dimensional body is continuing to damage the super-dimensional Dao species, and it is even affecting my will!"

Ye Tian was really shocked by the side effects of the black mist multi-dimensional body, the physical injury was easy to recover, but the super dimensional Dao type injury was difficult to recover, the key was that this kind of injury was continuous, and he needed to come to heal often.

And the injury is so serious, the foundation is damaged, not to mention the fourth realm, this physical body can't break through the third realm.

Fortunately, Ye Tian didn't care about this, otherwise he would be really depressed.

"In the case of physical body and extra-dimensional Dao damage, my strength is still far superior to the past!"

Ye Tian made a simple estimate, his current physical strength was at least six times that of the past, this was just a preliminary training of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, and if the physical body was still damaged, if the physical body was restored, there was a high probability that it could be equivalent to the physical body ten times the strength of the past.

"The innate multi-dimensional Dao body is too terrifying, if it is a truly complete innate multi-dimensional Dao body, once it is cultivated, the strength of the physical body is estimated to be equivalent to an increase of dozens of times. If you continue to improve, let the innate multi-dimensional Dao body become small or even large, then the increase in physical strength will be incomparably terrifying!"

As soon as Ye Tian thought about it, he couldn't wait to find the perfect innate multi-dimensional Dao body.

But he is not qualified for such a inheritance now, and he cannot keep such a inheritance.

Anyway, for him, if he initially cultivated this incomplete black mist multidimensional body, he could already enter this black mist stone statue area without dying, and he didn't need to use the black mist stone.

Ye Tian stepped into the Black Mist Stone Statue area.

In the past, as soon as he entered here, he would be killed by countless black mist energies.

But at this moment, he only felt the erosion of his body, but he was not killed in seconds.

Moreover, practicing here for a long time will also help to improve the multidimensional body of the black mist.

However, his black mist multidimensional body was too incomplete, and if he absorbed the black mist energy here for a long time, he would definitely not be able to last long. []

Therefore, he did not absorb too much black mist energy, so that he could stay here for a long time.

......

Near the Black Mist Stone Statue.

Ye Tian came here, and then began to comprehend the Black Mist Stone Statue.

Moreover, he used extradimensional rules to cover himself, and he was not afraid of the secret exposure of the black fog extradimensional body.

"Let's continue to meditate!"

Ye Tian practiced seriously, striving to quickly improve the extradimensional rules with the help of this black mist stone statue.

The years passed, and one extradimensional epoch after another passed.

Ten extradimensional eras!

Twenty extradimensional eras!

Thirty extradimensional eras!

At this time, Ye Tian's super-dimensional rule realm had reached sixty thousand silks, that is, the six-point realm.

If you go to the third realm now, the success rate is close to 100%, but it is still not the most perfect state.

Therefore, he still needs to continue to comprehend the extradimensional rules and raise the extradimensional rules to the seven-point realm.

With his current comprehension efficiency, it will take about a hundred extradimensional epochs to successfully comprehend the extradimensional rules to the seventy percent realm.

The other side.

Ye Tian and the Lord of the Moon Realm had already left the territory of No. 533, went to the territory of No. 500, rented a cave, and slowly cultivated asceticly, without participating in anything, very low-key.

Of course, he was also inquiring about treasures that could help the Lord of the Moon Realm heal, but the treasures that could heal the Lord of the Moon Realm were too rare, and it was impossible to buy multi-dimensional essences that could help heal injuries, and the other treasures were similar.

But as long as you inquire slowly, maybe when, Ye Tian will find out the relevant information!

Although the treasures that can completely heal the Moon Realm Lord cannot be purchased, there are still treasures that can help suppress or slightly heal the Moon Moon Realm Lord, and he can buy a little bit every few years, and gradually stabilize the Moon Moon Realm Lord's injuries, allowing his injuries to heal at a slow speed.

Gradually, a hundred extradimensional epochs passed.

Finally, Ye Tian's super-dimensional rule realm reached the seven-point realm.

At this time, he was already 100% able to break through to the third realm, and he could open up the most perfect extradimensional realm in his body.
